title: Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-15
content:
# Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-15

## Focus for Today (Sunday)
Sunday pipeline + authority stack:
1) warm lead pipeline movement
2) sphere referral nudges
3) one consumer-facing Vancouver market-readiness post
4) COI intros with coffee conversion
5) recruiting maintenance only (strict cap)

## 1) Warm Lead Follow-up Block (12)

**Message A (Sunday timing check):**
"Hey [Name] — quick Sunday check-in: are you still targeting a spring move in Vancouver, or has your timeline shifted? I can send a quick game plan based on your target area."

**Message B (calendar CTA):**
"If useful, let’s do a fast 10-minute call this week so you’re clear on next steps. I can do [Option 1] or [Option 2]."

## 2) Past-Client Sphere Check-in Block (6)

"Hey [Name] — hope your Sunday’s going well. If someone in your circle is thinking about buying or selling this spring, I can help them map a no-pressure plan. Want me to send a quick Vancouver neighborhood snapshot you can pass along?"

## 3) Consumer-Facing Post (publish today)

**Hook:** "Vancouver homeowners: 3 pricing mistakes to avoid before listing this spring."

**Post draft:**
"If you’re thinking about selling this spring, avoid these 3 common pricing mistakes:\n\n1) Pricing from hope instead of current neighborhood data\n2) Ignoring active competition buyers are comparing you against\n3) Waiting too long to adjust if showing activity is weak\n\nComment ‘PRICE’ and I’ll send a simple Vancouver pricing prep checklist."

## 4) COI Outreach Block (3 intros, 1 coffee ask)

"Hey [Name] — I’m tightening my Vancouver referral network across mortgage, legal, and inspection partners so clients get better outcomes. Open to a quick coffee next week to compare what buyers/sellers are struggling with right now?"

## 5) Recruiting Maintenance (15-minute cap)

Send 2 warm recruiting follow-ups max using existing scripts. No new recruiting campaign work.

## End-of-Day Scorecard Targets
- Warm follow-ups sent: 12
- Past-client check-ins sent: 6
- Consumer posts published: 1
- COI intros sent: 3
- Coffee chats booked: 1
- Recruiting follow-ups sent: 2 (cap)
- Replies received: target 6+
- Calls booked: target 2+
- Consults booked: target 1+
